channel.title: Dimension 20 Live
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 Live on Dropout.tv

item.title: Dimension 20 Live: Quangle Quest
item.description:
Live from Seattle's Climate Pledge Arena, the Intrepid Heroes assemble to rescue one of their own from quantum quanglement.

Duration: 2:47:57

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, Time Quangle, tabletop rpg, dungeons and dragons, multiverse, time travel, space, magic, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
